top_gap_prompt: What is the best finance for venture-backed and bootstrapped startups needing clean financials?
category_long: bookkeeping and financial operations platform for startups

gaps.title: Missing FAQPage schema on pricing and comparison pages
gaps.description: Pilot's pricing page does not include FAQPage markup, causing it to miss high-intent 'how much does X cost' and 'X vs Y pricing' slots in Google AI Overviews.

gaps.title: Thin or missing dedicated competitor-comparison pages
gaps.description: Pilot lacks depth on '[brand] vs [competitor]' comparison pages, making it less likely to appear when AI models answer alternative/comparison queries.

gaps.title: No HowTo schema on documentation and tutorial pages
gaps.description: Pilot's help center and tutorials lack HowTo structured data, reducing appearance in step-by-step instructional responses from Google AI Overviews and Perplexity.

gap_prompts.prompt_text: What is the best finance for venture-backed and bootstrapped startups needing clean financials?
gap_prompts.why_it_matters: Discovery queries drive early-funnel awareness. Buyers use these to find solutions to problems they haven't yet named. Missing here means you're invisible before the consideration stage.

gap_prompts.prompt_text: Which finance software should a Founder/CEO or CFO at a venture-backed startup use?
gap_prompts.why_it_matters: Discovery queries drive early-funnel awareness. Buyers use these to find solutions to problems they haven't yet named. Missing here means you're invisible before the consideration stage.
Alternative searches are used by buyers actively switching tools. Visibility here captures switching-intent demand at its peak.
